positive: A minimalist, geometric illustration of a soaring golden eagle in flight, stylized as a modern tribal tattoo design. The eagle's silhouette is sharply defined against a vibrant gradient sky of deep sapphire blue merging into rich sunset orange. The design incorporates intricate linework and abstract feather patterns using complementary black ink accents. Composition is centered and balanced, optimized for repeating apparel pattern. High contrast, vector art aesthetic, clean lines, symmetrical composition, graphic novel quality, UHD, print-ready.
